title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: The video argues that AI agents are now performing complex tasks like coding, research, and scientific discovery, moving the question from AI perfection to whether imperfect AI has already become useful enough to accelerate real work. It presents Demis Hassabis saying humanity may be in the foothills of the singularity and discusses various deployed AI agent applications across Google DeepMind, AWS, and research projects.
